name: Acadian Asset Management Inc.
business: Acadian Asset Management Inc. is a holding company that operates a systematic investment management business through its majority-owned subsidiary, Acadian Asset Management LLC, which offers institutional investors access to a diversified array of systematic investment strategies designed to meet a range of risk and return objectives.
sellsTo: institutional clients (public and private funds, endowments, foundations)

exposures.sentence: Acadian LLC pursues a fundamentally grounded, data-rich, and highly structured approach to investing that seeks to identify and exploit systematic and structural inefficiencies in the markets.
Our investment process is systematically driven and is supported by a sophisticated systems environment, including the use of artificial intelligence.

Our or our third-party service providers use of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies could result in new and expanded risks, particularly as the use of AI applications increases in prevalence and scope.
